title: ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. - Quarterly Financial Results
text: ChargePoint Reports Third and Fourth Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results. Revenue grew 6% year-over-year to $106 million, above top end of the guidance range, with subscription revenue growing 15% year-over-year to $42 million. GAAP gross margin was 31% and non-GAAP gross margin remained at a record high of 33%. Third quarter GAAP net loss was $52.5 million, down 32% from $77.6 million in the prior year's same quarter, and non-GAAP adjusted EBITDA loss was $19.4 million, down 32% from $28.6 million in the prior year's same quarter. The company reported earnings of negative $1.32 per share, beating estimates of negative $1.34 by $0.02. Fourth quarter revenue was $109.3 million, up 7% from $101.9 million in the prior year's same quarter. Subscription revenue was $42.5 million, up 11% from $38.3 million in the prior year's same quarter. Fourth quarter GAAP net loss was $44.4 million, down 24% from $58.8 million in the prior year's same quarter, and non-GAAP pre-tax net loss was $11.7 million, down 52% from $24.4 million in the prior year's same quarter.
